title: Davilanthus purpusii
taxonomy: Davilanthus purpusii is a genus of plant in the family Celastraceae. The Celastraceae family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the staff vine or bittersweet family. This family includes various species of trees, shrubs, and vines, many of which are native to tropical and subtropical regions. The plants within the Celastraceae family are known for their diverse range of characteristics, including their leaves, flowers, and fruits. Overall, the classification of Davilanthus purpusii within the Celastraceae family reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history.
